overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a grand gothic hall with a central fountain statue, viewed from a fixed balcony position. Students in dark robes walk through the hall below while the player character observes the scene. The environment features stone architecture, high ceilings, and moody artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with central fountain statue and balconies

entered.detail: large ornate fountain with white statue of a figure on horseback, water cascading down tiers

sweeping stone staircase descending to the main floor on the right side

massive stone column framing the left side of the view
massive stone column framing the right side of the view

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a fixed position on an upper balcony overlooking a grand gothic hall. A central fountain with an equestrian statue dominates the marble floor below, while students in dark robes walk through the space in various directions. The architecture features massive stone pillars, sweeping staircases on either side, and ornate archways at the far end, all lit by moody artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective over a grand gothic hall, capturing the atmospheric movement of students within a cavernous stone interior. It begins from a fixed position on an upper balcony, looking down upon a marble floor dominated by a central fountain and an equestrian statue. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts to the students in dark robes who drift in various directions across the expanse. The scene then expands to encompass the surrounding architecture, highlighting massive stone pillars and sweeping staircases that lead toward ornate archways. Finally, the view settles into the moody artificial lighting that casts deep shadows across the gothic stonework.
